notes: Full IST clinical-trial analysis (descriptives, unadjusted/adjusted logistic regression, IPW via PROC GENMOD, and Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel interaction/stratified analyses). The original PROC IMPORT read a hardcoded SAS-Studio path; here the same 18 kept/renamed analysis variables are read inline via a DATALINES step (a 100-row sample of the repo's IST.csv, balanced across aspirin/placebo, sex, and hemorrhagic/initial-stroke outcomes). One further edit: the generic yes/no user format the program named $format is named $yn_format here; its value mapping and every attrib reference are otherwise identical. All analysis logic is verbatim.
